description: A modular machine learning framework for budget execution & data analysis built in Python with Scikit, XGBoost, PyTorch, and TensorFlow.
A framework for encapsulating and representing detection results and metadata into interoperable records about analytics subjects that are detected by machine learning pipelines in the edge
An opinionated machine learning framework.
Simple Framework to create game for my machine learning research testing AI
Algorithmic Trading in Python with Machine Learning
Machine learningbased framework for analyzing financial datasets and generating data-driven investment recommendations across multiple domains.
Machine learning framework for EV battery SoH and RUL prediction
Machine Learning library in C and Python to create and run custom network intrusion models on a Raspberry Pi Pico 2W
Cloud-Aware DEM Inundation Mapping (CADIM) : A geospatial framework for flood mapping under cloud cover using machine learning and digital elevation models (DEMs).
Hybrid machine learning and live-API framework for automated SOC threat triage
Machine learning framework for the identification of Non-Coding RNAs

Code to process data to train a machine learning DroughtFormer, built in the CREDIT framework, to predict drought related variables (ML model is trained globally, but there is a regional focus on Africa). Also contains code to analyze DroughtFormer predictions.
HCC-SPML: Multi-task ML framework for HCC post-surgical survival prediction  binary mortality classification and 2-year survival analysis. Published at CICET 2025.

ML Model Trainer  A Python-based framework for training, evaluating, and deploying machine learning models. Supports custom datasets, automated preprocessing, model selection, and export to formats like TensorFlow Lite or PyTorch. Ideal for beginners and developers building production-ready ML pipelines.

A modular Python framework for fairness-aware post-processing in machine learning.  The library takes classifier probabilities and learns optimal decision thresholds  by optimizing multiple fairness and performance metrics, enabling multi-objective  selection via methods such as TOPSIS and Zenith.
A comprehensive machine learning framework for quantitative trading strategies
A freelance from-scratch Python library project for machine learning and deep learning with visualizations, built using only raw Python and NumPy without external ML frameworks.
Multi-agent evolutionary framework for automated scientific machine learning discovery

This project presents a novel black-box auditing framework designed to detect backdoors in text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models, specifically tailored for Machine Learning as a Service (MLaaS) platforms.
Machine learning framework for multi-level product classification on Etsy using TF-IDF, XGBoost, and embedding-based approaches for top and bottom category prediction.
This project integrates historical stock data, technical indicators, sentiment analysis, and machine learning (XGBoost, Random Forest) to predict trends and generate Buy/Sell/Hold signals.

A machine learning framework to predict brain stroke risk using demographic, medical, and lifestyle data from patient records. The pipeline features robust data preprocessing to handle class imbalance and evaluates five supervised classification models to identify key health predictors.
This repo contains the code structure of the IEEE paper "A Machine Learning Framework for Patient Stratification & Complications Prediction"

A machine learning framework designed to enhance the speed and accuracy of stroke identification. This model leverages deep learning architectures to analyze neuroimaging data (MRI/CT), assisting in the rapid diagnosis and classification of ischemic and hemorrhagic strokes.
An end-to-end quantitative research and trading framework integrating factor modeling, machine learning, and backtesting with risk-adjusted performance evaluation (Sharpe ratio, drawdown).
Framework for solving discrete optimization problems using a combination of Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MIP) and Machine Learning (ML)

A deep dive into the mathematical core of Machine Learning. Purely NumPy-based implementations of Neural Networks (MLPs) and Gradient Descent from scratch. Features an MNIST Handwritten Digit Classifier achieving ~90% accuracy without high-level frameworks like TensorFlow/PyTorch.
A business intelligence and machine learning framework that predicts surge pricing events, enabling ride-sharing platforms to shift from reactive pricing to proactive, data-driven decision-making.
AutoFAIR is a model-agnostic framework for automated bias detection and adaptive fairness mitigation in machine learning systems.

CineMatch AI is a movie recommendation system that offers more than traditional methods. It combines various machine learning techniques into one framework. The system uses content-based filtering with TF-IDF and cosine similarity, collaborative filtering with user interaction data, and NLP-based semantic embeddings. This combination helps it under

Developed an ensemble machine learning framework for detecting and classifying obfuscated malware using the CIC-MalMem-2022 dataset. Applied feature selection, data balancing, and models like RF, XGBoost, and MLP, achieving robust detection across binary and multiclass tasks.
About AI-powered cyber forensics tool that automatically analyzes system logs, detects anomalies using Machine Learning, reconstructs attack timelines, and generates forensic reports.
Discovery of TDP-43 aggregation inhibitors via a hybrid machine learning framework

The dashboard consolidates all analytical components into a single visual interface, making the system accessible and interpretable for researchers, policymakers, and agricultural stakeholders. Overall, the proposed framework demonstrates how machine learning, statistical risk modeling, causal analysis.

Financial Risk Intelligence System (FRIS): A modular machine learning framework developed for New England College to predict student loan default risk, optimize institutional retention, and ensure federal compliance.
An advanced web-based data platform using Python frameworks that integrates multiple data sources and applies machine learning for predictive analytics.
The Neural Hallows: Triadic framework for Bio-AI interfaces using brain organoids, machine learning and neuroelectronic systems

A modular computational research framework for building, evaluating, and analysing advanced machine learning models in healthcare and cognitive decision-making domains. Includes explainability, uncertainty analysis, and reproducible experimental pipelines.

Streamlit Complete Reference Notes Streamlit is an open-source Python framework for building interactive web apps for data science and machine learning  with no front-end experience required. You write pure Python, and Streamlit renders the UI in a browser. Every time a user interacts with a widget, the script reruns from top to bottom.

OptiCover Analytics is a high-performance machine learning framework developed . The system is engineered to solve a complex multi-class classification problem, accurately predicting which of ten distinct insurance coverage bundlesranging from AutoLiability_Basic to PremiumHealthLife a prospective customer is most likely to select.

A comprehensive research framework combining static code analysis, dynamic  behavioral monitoring, and machine learning to detect malicious npm packages.  Final year project from University of Ruhuna.

GreenLens is an iOS application that uses on-device machine learning to analyze land through the camera and estimate carbon credit value. Built with SwiftUI and Apples Vision framework, it performs low-latency inference without relying on cloud services.
A machine learning experimentation framework that allows users to train, compare, and ensemble multiple classification and regression models on CSV datasets
A simulation framework evaluating the performance of rule-based, statistical, and ML (Machine Learning) trigger systems for real-time filtering of physics data streams.
Udemy Stock Prediction portal using Django REST Framework, React.js and Machine Learning

A Carbon-Aware DevOps framework designed to optimize energy efficiency in AI-driven crop yield prediction. This project implements GreenOps principles to minimize the environmental footprint of machine learning pipelines while maintaining high predictive accuracy for sustainable agriculture.
Development of an Explainable Machine Learning Framework for Intelligent Train Operation

GCE framework for interpretable modeling in cardiac sarcoma survival using machine and deep learning. It captures complex feature relationships to enhance predictive insights and clinical understanding.
A GIS based framework for building level population estimation and clustering using spatial analysis and machine learning.
A Swift project for developing machine learning applications on Apple platforms (iOS, macOS), leveraging Core ML and other frameworks.
Core functionality for the MLJ machine learning framework
HLSFactory: A Framework Empowering High-Level Synthesis Datasets for Machine Learning and Beyond
A Julia-based library for quantum machine learning research and development, integrating with quantum computing frameworks.

The XFL Framework is a software platform that enables the configuration of experimentation parameters, the selection of measurement metrics, the deployment, and the visualization of results of a distributed machine learning algorithm (XFL) on real hardware nodes.

This project builds a predictive analytics framework to forecast children in HHS care under the UAC Program. Using time-series and machine learning models, it converts historical data into forward-looking insights to support proactive planning and manage future care demand and system pressure.
A Rust project for building a high-performance, safe, and concurrent machine learning framework, focusing on systems-level AI development.

Mapping Alternate Scenarios of Forest Intactness (MASFI) is a cloud-based machine learning framework. It uses XGBoost regression and remote sensing data such as GEDI LiDAR to create high-resolution maps and statistics, supporting protected area planning and management.
caretSDM applies a geoprocessing framework to the caret machine learning package, facilitating the access of Species Distribution Modeling community to state-of-the-art methods.

PhaseForge is a framework for high-throughput alloy phase diagram prediction using machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) integrated with ATAT and CALPHAD modeling. Includes tools for structure relaxation, molecular dynamics, and TDB generation.

The "AI-Driven Cyber Attack Detection and Real-Time Security Monitoring System" is a web-based application developed using the Django framework and Machine Learning algorithms that aims to provide an intelligent, automated solution for identifying and classifying cyber attacks from network traffic data in real-time.
Machine learning framework for predicting corrosion resistance and yield strength in Fe-Cr-Ni-Al-Cu high-entropy alloys

CyberShield Ultimate is a real-time Security Operations Center (SOC) framework. Powered by Python and Machine Learning, it features live network packet capture, AI anomaly detection, active process monitoring, and threat geolocation. It includes 14 integrated security modules for file vetting, port scanning, and automated risk reporting.
Keep track of the newest machine learning frameworks on GitHub

This project presents a molecular dynamics (MD) simulation of the hybrid perovskite crystal H5PbCl3N2 using the MACE-MP machine learning potential within the ASE (Atomic Simulation Environment) framework.

A hybrid machine-learning and EOF-based framework for long-lead ENSO prediction using oceanatmosphere predictors (Nio-3.4 SST, SOI, and warm water volume). The model integrates EOF-based dimensionality reduction with ridge regression and random forest to improve forecast skill up to 24 months.
An integrated computational framework combining machine learning predictions with empirical multi-omics validation to systematically map and decode tracrRNA-dependent off-target (TDO) events.

An analysis framework for detecting market regime shifts in global energy commodities sector (20002024). This project applies advanced statistical methods and machine learning to uncover hidden patterns in crude oil, Brent crude, natural gas, heating oil, and RBOB gasoline prices, with practical applications for risk management and forecasting.
A custom machine learning framework developed in Python, Rust and CUDA C++.

Email is a primary communication tool in personal and professional life, Rapid growth of emails leads to email overload , Large number of spam and important emails mixed together, Manual sorting is time-consuming and inefficient, Existing systems mainly focus on spam detection only .

A cloud auto-scaling framework that combines machine learning prediction, cost optimization, container-VM hybrid management, anomaly detection, and adaptive resource tuning to achieve zero SLA violations at 91% lower cost than existing approaches.
Machine learning project that predicts social media engagement success using early persuasion signals, influencer authority, and algorithmic amplification in a two-stage framework.
ML-APT: Machine Learning-enhanced Atom ProbeTomography Framework

This project is part of an Introduction to Machine Learning course, focusing on an end-to-end ML workflow through a Kaggle competition. It covers the full pipeline from Exploratory Data Analysis and feature engineering to model development and evaluation, implemented across multiple frameworks.

This thesis develops a multi-stage framework for detecting, ranking, and visualising money laundering activity on the Bitcoin blockchain using machine learning and network analysis of the Elliptic++ dataset.
Machine learning framework for insurance claim prediction and policyholder risk scoring
A machine learning framework for fantasy football forecasting that mitigates cognitive bias in player rankings using pure XGBoost algorithmic modeling and statistical benchmarking.
Machine Learning Quantitative Model Research Framework
Autoware-ML is a machine learning framework for multiple tasks, supporting the full lifecycle - training, evaluation, optimization, and deployment of models with native runtime support in Autoware.
A Real-Time Non-Intrusive Behavioral Framework  for Cognitive Workload Awareness Using Machine Learning on Mouse and Keyboard Dynamics
An open standard for psychological models, cognitive frameworks, and behavioral patterns  structured, research-backed, and machine-readable

The development and evaluation of the RAF, a reliability and trustworthiness assessment framework for any AI project. Tested through a practical use case, involving machine learning-driven prediction of heartbeats in radar signals.

Transaction data is analyzed to identify abnormal patterns linked to fraudulent activity.  Machine learning models are used to accurately classify transactions and adapt to new fraud patterns.  The framework supports early detection and improves the security and reliability of financial transactions.

This project is a Machine Learning-based web application that predicts the price of a car based on various features such as brand, year, fuel type, and more. The model is trained using a dataset of used cars and deployed using a Flask web framework to provide real-time predictions through a user-friendly interface.

An integrated research framework for quantifying drug-drug interactions using Fractional Differential Equations (FDE) and predicting clinical outcomes through machine learning. Features a production-ready analytical engine and exploratory data visualizations of FDA-documented interactions
KetML is a python machine learning framework with an OpenCL backend

A production-ready AI engineering stack built with Python, combining modern backend development and machine learning workflows. This repository showcases how to design, build, and deploy intelligent systems using FastAPI, ML/DL frameworks, and scalable architecture.
An evaluation framework for machine learning models simulating high-throughput materials discovery.
A flexible and modular machine learning framework designed to support leakage-free model training through custom cross-validation fold construction

The performance of different machine learning frameworks, like the support vector machine (SVM), random forest, gradient descent, and decision tree, is implemented to enhance the performance of the OFDM system model. The project can give effective performance concerning the machine learning model for different numbers of pilots and lengths of CPs.

Traffic prediction using deep learning represents a significant advancement in intelligent transportation systems. This paper presents a comprehensive framework for developing a Traffic Prediction Application that combines state-of-the-art machine learning models with practical web application implementation.

OpenEnv environment for protoplanetary disk image analysis using machine learning.  Multi-task learning framework with 3 difficulty levels (transit detection, disk  classification, property estimation). Built for Meta Scaler OpenEnv Hackathon.
A differentiable ray tracer using the PyTorch machine-learning framework in Python.
Physics-constrained multi-task machine learning framework for the concurrent prediction of dielectric constant (k) and Youngs modulus (E) of low-k materials.

A Machine Learning framework for discovering and characterizing scenarios from trajectory datasets into different interaction types by combining state-of-the-art trajectory forecasting and embedding quantization techniques.

Machine learning framework for multi-class product categorization in e-commerce using structured metadata and textual features. Combines TF-IDF, transformer embeddings (MiniLM), and ensemble models (Logistic Regression, XGBoost, MLP) to predict hierarchical product categories with strong F1 performance.

This repository contains a set of CMSSW modules and helper scripts designed to preprocess particle physics data (specifically from MINIAOD files) into flat `TTree` ROOT files. The resulting files are optimized for subsequent analysis, particularly for training machine learning models. The framework is configured to handle AK15 jets with condor
Collection of machine learning projects spanning healthcare prediction, business analytics, and NLP - built with Python, scikit-learn, and deep learning frameworks.
PU prediction framework composed of traditional machine learning models and deep learning models

This project is a comprehensive framework for credit risk analysis, designed to predict loan defaults and quantify potential losses for a lending portfolio. It utilizes a machine learning approach to build predictive models for key risk components, providing a data-driven solution for risk management.
